Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about TimorList

How do I list my business on TimorList?

To list your business on TimorList, click the 'List Your Business' button on the homepage. Fill in your business details including name, category, contact information, and address. Choose your subscription plan and submit. Your listing will be reviewed and published within 24 hours.

Is TimorList free to use?

Yes, TimorList is completely free for consumers to browse and discover local businesses. Business owners can create a basic listing at no cost. Premium features like product listings, enhanced visibility, and priority placement are available with paid subscription plans.

How can I update my business information?

Sign in to your account and navigate to 'My Account'. Select the business you want to update and click 'Edit'. You can update your address, contact information, operating hours, photos, products, and more. Changes are reflected immediately after saving.

How do reviews work on TimorList?

Any registered user can leave a review for a business they've visited or used. Reviews help other consumers make informed decisions and provide valuable feedback to business owners. We encourage honest and constructive reviews to maintain quality.

What subscription plans are available?

We offer three plans: Basic (free) with standard listing, Pro ($25/month) with product listings and enhanced visibility, and Max ($50/month) with all features plus priority placement and dedicated support.

How can I contact TimorList support?

You can reach our support team by email at support@timbiz.com or through the contact form on our website. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.

Still have questions?

Can't find the answer you're looking for? Contact our support team.

Contact Support
